---
name: read-and-update-docs
description: What docuements to read and when to update them
---

Read DESIGN.md as if you are a project manager or a designer.
Read IMPLEMENTATION.md as if you are a developer.
When add new feature, update DESIGN.md first, then update IMPLEMENTATION.md.
When fix a bug, update IMPLEMENTATION.md first, then update DESIGN.md if necessary.
